summary: The protagonist, referred to as the 'Ranker,' defeats a boss monster and gains experience, leveling up his stats in the process. News of his undefeated streak in the arena creates a massive stir among players and guilds, who are fascinated by his mysterious identity and flawless combat record. Following the battle, the protagonist reflects on the fight and anticipates finding more spiders in the layer.
key_moments: The protagonist defeats a boss monster and gains experience points.
Spectators and guilds discuss the protagonist's undefeated arena record with shock and awe.
The protagonist prepares to face more spiders after learning a new skill.
